mentions.note: Preferred over Rambus in analog/mixed-signal semiconductor space; steady, well-managed; Cramer sees stronger relative position.

Tremendous guidance on Tuesday night; stock rallied 10% next day; analog chip maker with 9% data center exposure; much more leveraged to real-world economy; data center business up 64% YoY; first profitable quarter since 1985.
Industrial chips and new data center division benefiting from tight supply; 10% rise after long period of underperformance; management confirms tight supply trend.
Cyclical semiconductor name; must trade, don't hold long-term.
Caller Donna up 32%; hold for chip sector rotation; haven't ignited yet but will participate in semiconductor recovery.
